Video.summary: Consider the imaginary lives of ordinary people who lived on the other side of history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Taking on the Other Side of History

Image.alt: Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History

Video.summary: Take a look at the lives of our ancestors, from ancient hominids to Homo erectus to the earliest humans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Paleolithic

Video.summary: Step into the world's earliest permanent settlement: the river banks in Mesopotamia.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Living in Mesopotamia

Video.summary: Travel to the world's first Western civilization and explore everyday life during the New Kingdom era.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Egyptian

Video.summary: Professor Garland takes you deep inside the lives of an ordinary Egyptian family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Belonging to an Egyptian Family

Video.summary: Meet some Egyptian gods'Hathor, Amun-Re, Osiris'and learn about the myths attached to them.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Practicing Egyptian Religion

Video.summary: Discover Egyptian beliefs about the afterlife and the journey from this world to the next.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being a Dead Egyptian

Video.summary: Take a tour of people in the professions that would been available to you in the village of Deir el-Medina.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being an Egyptian Worker

Video.summary: Professor McNabb discusses the foundation for medieval views of sex and sexuality.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: Consider medieval ideas about procreation and see how everyday people thought about their own bodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Image.alt: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Video.summary: Find out what medieval people did behind closed doors and see what could happen when they broke the rules.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Image.alt: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Video.summary: Consider the influence of the Church, the clergy, and clerical lawyers on marriage and sexuality.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Sex and the Medieval Church

Video.summary: Consider two chicken recipes 200 years and a continent apart.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cooking Across the Ages
Video.title: Understanding Culture through Cooking

Video.summary: Are the recipes in De re coquinaria bizarre or elegant?
Video.grandparentTitle: Cooking Across the Ages
Video.title: Ancient Rome: Cooking with Apicius

Video.summary: Examine a Chinese manual on "essential techniques to benefit the people."
Video.grandparentTitle: Cooking Across the Ages
Video.title: Imperial China: Soybeans and Dumplings

Video.summary: Explore recipes from 14th-century Egypt that reflect cultural interchange.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cooking Across the Ages
Video.title: Medieval Egypt: Chickpeas and Phyllo Dough

Image.alt: Medieval Egypt: Chickpeas and Phyllo Dough
Medieval Egypt: Chickpeas and Phyllo Dough
Medieval Egypt: Chickpeas and Phyllo Dough

Video.summary: What can the Bible tell us about life in biblical Israel? What can archaeology tell us?
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Image.alt: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Video.summary: Start your journey through biblical Israel with a look at the Babylonian exile.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Image.alt: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Video.summary: This episode examines the features of late medieval culture in Italy that paved the way for the Renaissance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Italy and the Renaissance

Video.summary: Around 1400, study a European-wide style known as International Gothic flourished in Italy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: From Gothic to Renaissance
